BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin estimate of the hospitality committee's monthly operating budget, ahead of the fall planning meeting.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with the committee treasurer once 2025 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Storage & venue lease increases to $750/mo at renewal
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $2,670 + $100 increase = $2,770. At $95 average per contributor, $2,770 / $95 = 29.2 → 30 contributors minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 55 regular contributors.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - storage/venue to $850/mo (unlikely)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. Unlikely, but worth stress-testing.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~28-30 regular contributors at the current cost structure. At 55 we have plenty of headroom. Main concern was the seasonal dip but even at 48 (December low) we're safe.
ActionItems: Confirm the storage-lease renewal terms with the operator
Revisit after year-end with the committee treasurer for proper modeling
